curation_notes: Patch modifies only byte_struct/src/lib.rs (1 file, +8 -20 lines). The fix replaces unsafe std::mem::uninitialized() + ptr::write pattern with a safe collect/try_into pattern in both read_bytes_default_le and read_bytes_default_be within the byte_struct_array macro. CWE-119 and CWE-908 map to buffer-overflow; the core issue is dropping uninitialized memory on panic (CWE-908), but buffer-overflow is the closest valid class given the pre-assigned CWE-119 mapping. No sibling files exist — the crate has a single source file.
